nasb.text: Now these are the names of the sons of Israel who came to Egypt with Jacob; they came each one with his household:

esv.text: These are the names of the sons of Israel who came to Egypt with Jacob, each with his household:

cnv.text: 以色列的眾子，各人帶著家眷和雅各一同來到埃及。他們的名字是：

ccb.text: 以色列的众子带着家眷跟雅各一起去了埃及，以下是他们的名字：
